inline_comments.message: this goes agains CSIT rules.  Docker generation must always be part of the project build.

correct approach will be to move this to each profile. I think I mentioned this to Aditya last week.

        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>com.google.cloud.tools</groupId>
                <artifactId>jib-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>

I will propose a fix[0], I hope you don't mind. We can save some time based on the different time zones we work. So you can test the fix, if it gets merged before you start.

[0] https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/cps/+/118138

you are creating 3 images with the same name cps-nf-service. Thus you are blocking to generate 2 different types of image if desired.
if you generate a different one, you can distinguish what it contains plus one overriding each other.
Plus names has been decided by the team already.
Same applies for changes on next lines.

I would see the development process in a different way.

In early dev cycle steps, in my local env, I don't want mvn clean package to build any docker image (it requires docker to run, takes more time to build, fills my local file system, ...). This stage requiring repetitive tasks should be straightforward, simple, fast, and light.

Later on in the dev cycle, at integration steps, docker images are required. Also, automatic pipelines to run integration tests are responsible to run appropriate command to build docker images, they will run tests against.

I can not say for CSIT specifically as I'm not familiar with it.

Each docker profile generates a different docker image:
* `cps-docker` profile generates `cps-service` image (line 122)
* `xnf-docker` profile generates `cps-nf-service` image (line 138)
* `cps-xnf-docker` profile generates `cps-and-nf-service` image (line 154)

Please, let me know if you spot any bug.

Is not the way ONAP + CSIT wants to go -> 
https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Project-specific+CSIT+structure
plus there is link for a video on main chat, and I'm pretty sure sent it to you some time ago that you can watch.
Anyway you can find more info on https://jira.onap.org/browse/CPS-188

my bad, sorry. I overlooked and saw the same name. At any rate those names were decided by the team already, 
if it was decided to change it again. I was not aware of such decision.

I'm just letting know the desired way to go, not what I want, just to be clear. If Lasse assist to our CSIT internal meeting, then the team can ask about this and decide.
